General.Name: Green Earth Group N.V.
General.Description: Hawick Data N.V. engages in media advertising business in the Netherlands. The company offers display standard advertisements; fixed positions text links; and branded content articles. It also provides paid subscriptions. Hawick Data N.V. was founded in 1999 and is based in Bussum, the Netherlands.
